message:
fix(crypto): add length-validating Deserialize impl for X25519PublicKey

Replace derive(Deserialize) with a manual impl that validates the
deserialized byte vec is exactly X25519_PUBLIC_KEY_SIZE (32 bytes)
before constructing the key. The derive macro silently accepted any
byte length, which could produce invalid keys that would either panic
or produce incorrect DH shared secrets downstream.

The custom deserializer:
- Deserializes to Vec<u8> first
- Checks length == 32, returning a descriptive error on mismatch
- Copies into a fixed-size array and calls from_bytes()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
